/usr/bin/ar qc libstable-diffusion.a "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/convert.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/core/backend_fit.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/core/ggml_extend_backend.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/core/ggml_graph_cut.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/core/layer_split_partition.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/core/util.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/extensions/photomaker_extension.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/extensions/pulid_extension.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/model_io/gguf_io.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/model_io/pickle_io.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/model_io/safetensors_io.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/model_io/torch_legacy_io.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/model_io/torch_zip_io.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/model_loader.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/model_manager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/name_conversion.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/runtime/guidance.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/runtime/imatrix.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/runtime/sample-cache.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/stable-diffusion.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/tokenizers/bpe_tokenizer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/tokenizers/clip_tokenizer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/tokenizers/gemma_tokenizer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/tokenizers/gpt_oss_tokenizer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/tokenizers/mistral_tokenizer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/tokenizers/qwen2_tokenizer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/tokenizers/t5_unigram_tokenizer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/tokenizers/tokenize_util.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/tokenizers/tokenizer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/tokenizers/vocab/vocab.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/upscaler.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stable-diffusion.dir/src/version.cpp.o" thirdparty/CMakeFiles/zip.dir/zip.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libstable-diffusion.a
